2AD3722B4AA8277D2B616EA3B2FF3964: Found in the Land of Monsters. Beware! You can only travel there through a Portal in the Monastery of Spinjitzu.
E4F4D948453F0702F575FABBB0E8B479: These descendants of the Thunderfang are legion and use the power of Chaos to switch between ELEMENTS in battle. But their Chaotic nature means only one can appear in the Land of Monsters at a time.
70EB058942B3B9AE472B2885C8BCC065: Travel through a Portal in the land where Ninja spin.
